NERC says strong resource additions boost US summer grid readiness, risks remain
The Biggest Challenge of a Utility Megadeal: Regulators
Charts Suggest Utilities Sector Is Headed for a Pullback

holdings.infoBox: IDU is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are NextEra Energy stock at 11.27%, The Southern Company at 6.51%, Duke Energy at 6.11%, Constellation Energy at 5.11%, and Waste Management at 5.10%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Utilities ETF (IDU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund tracks a broad, market-cap-weighted index of US utilities stocks. IDU was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Biggest US grid paid record $1 billion to money-losing power plants in Q1
data.text: Power plants on the largest U.S. electric grid received a record payout of nearly $1 billion to cover their losses in the first quarter, when ​fuel costs surged during a winter cold snap, according to...

data.title: NERC says strong resource additions boost US summer grid readiness, risks remain
data.text: The North American Electric Reliability Corp. (NERC) said in a report on Tuesday that record ​resource additions have strengthened U.S. grid readiness ‌for the summer season, even as elevated risks re...

data.title: The Biggest Challenge of a Utility Megadeal: Regulators
data.text: NextEra and Dominion must convince state and federal regulators that combining two of the U.S.'s largest utilities will benefit customers and avoid increasing electricity bills.

data.title: Utilities ETFs outperform as investors make defensive bets
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to utilities rallied Thursday, part of a broader defensive tone in the market.
